title: Candlestick Holders, Taper Candle Holders Glass, Candle Pillar Stands for Table Mantel Wedding Housewarming Gift Home Decoration (Gold 2pcs)
features: High-Precision Glass Materials - Safety and Unbreakable. The heavier and wider base prevents tipping during use. Glass is not easy to burn and will not release harmful gases.
Glass Candle Holder - The round candlestick with its beautiful argyle glass surface and breathtaking intricate details. Candlelight reflects beautiful light and shadow effects through the glass.
Easy to Clean: The glass candle holder has a smooth surface, easy to clean, just wash it with warm water and soap.

An occasion for Decorative - This gorgeous candlestick holder is the perfect way to style up your living room and bedroom. It can be used as Valentine's Day, Christmas, Halloween, New Year, or Thanksgiving decorations.

Perfect Gift - Candle stick candles are the perfect table decoration for a romantic candle-lit dinner, dinner party with friends, summer nights in the garden, Sunday lunch, afternoon tea, Christmas, or even a wedding!
description: Product Description Clear Glass Candlestick Holders 2pcs Set Taper Candle Holders for Formal Events Wedding Festival Party Festival Decoration Product Details Round smooth tip, easy and effortless insertion of the candle, more to protect your hands from scratches Diamond check design, firm base, standing firmly on the table Crystal transparent design, beautiful and unique Suitable for most candle sizes, universal styles Application Home Decoration Festival Celebration Holiday Gift
